name: node-lodash-packages
title: node-lodash-packages
summary: Lo-dash is a Node.js utility library (per method packages)
description:
Lo-dash is a Node.js utility library (per method packages)
Lodash makes JavaScript easier by taking the hassle out of working with arrays
, numbers, objects, strings, etc. Lodash’s modular methods are great for:
* Iterating arrays, objects, & strings
* Manipulating & testing values
* Creating composite functions
.
This package provides lodash methods exported as separate modules.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-lodash-packages because Lo-dash is a Node.js utility library (per method packages).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-lodash-packages as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-lodash-packages with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-lodash-packages --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
